Container.Name: itsweber-mesh
Container.Overview: ITSWEBER Mesh is a self-hosted homelab dashboard — services, widgets, server stats, smart-home and cameras in one place. Live status from an in-process healthcheck scheduler, 19 widget kinds and 14 first-class integrations (Home Assistant, AdGuard, UniFi, UniFi Protect, Pi-hole, Glances, Portainer, Frigate, ESPHome, Zigbee2MQTT, Uptime Kuma, Speedtest, weather, custom REST). Optional Unraid GraphQL socket mount for native server stats. After install open the WebUI; the first-run wizard walks you through admin user + theme + integrations.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port the dashboard listens on inside the container. Map to a free host port (default 3000).

Config.Name: Config & Backups Volume
Config.Description: Persistent storage for config.json and schema-migration backups (config.json.pre-vN). Survives container replace and image upgrades.

Config.Name: MESH_SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: Random 32+ character string used to sign session cookies (HMAC). Generate ONCE with: openssl rand -hex 32 — and KEEP STABLE across container replaces, otherwise all active sessions are invalidated. REQUIRED.

Config.Name: DATA_DIR
Config.Description: Where the dashboard reads/writes its config. Match the volume target above. Advanced users only.

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: HTTP port inside the container. Match the WebUI port above. Advanced users only.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for log timestamps and the live clock in the header. e.g. Europe/Berlin, America/New_York, UTC.

Config.Name: Unraid GraphQL Socket (optional)
Config.Description: OPTIONAL: read-only mount of the Unraid GraphQL socket. Enables the native Unraid widget (CPU model, array state, container/VM counts) without an HTTP API key. Only available on Unraid 7.x with the unraid-api plugin running. Leave empty if you prefer the HTTP-based GraphQL endpoint instead.
